heading: How It Works
description: Calculate your Market Compensation Alignment (MCA) Score in three steps.

1.heading: Input Your Compensation
1.body: Provide your job title, state, and current base pay. Our smart autocomplete matches your role against federal BLS occupational classifications for maximum benchmarking accuracy.

2.heading: The Triangulation Engine
2.body: Our engine instantly cross-references your data against three distinct layers: official BLS federal statistics, national economic trends, and over 7,000,000 live US job listings.

3.heading: Your MCA Score
3.body: Receive a definitive MCA Score from 1-99. Instantly see if you are a Market Leader, Highly Competitive, or Below Market, with a detailed breakdown to help you negotiate your true value.

benchmark.description: Benchmark your role's market competitiveness in three simple steps.

1.heading: Define the Role
1.body: Enter the job title, target state, and offered base pay. We map the position to standard federal categories to ensure precise market comparison.

2.heading: Data Cross-Referencing
2.body: We query our live database of 7,000,000+ US salary benchmarks, combining official BLS data with real-time market demand to see how your offer stacks up.

3.heading: Get the MCA Verdict
3.body: Receive an instant alignment score. Find out if your offer is under-valued, fair value, or market-leading to ensure you attract and retain top talent.
